title: Matthiola pseudoxyceras
intro: Matthiola pseudoxyceras is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as a type of stock or evening primrose. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The bioactive constituents of Matthiola pseudoxyceras include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Matthiola pseudoxyceras is often used in herbal medicine and can be found in various preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in capsules and tablets.

It belongs to the genus Matthiola, which contains several species of plants commonly known as stock or evening primrose.
